ddls:
CREATE TABLE "repeaters" (
  "repeater_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repeater */,
  "callsign" TEXT /* Callsign of the repeater */,
  "tx_freq" REAL /* Transmit frequency of the repeater */,
  "rx_freq" REAL /* Receive frequency of the repeater */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the repeater */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area of coverage of the repeater */,
  "pr_st_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province or state where the repeater is located */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operational status of the repeater */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the repeater was last updated */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the repeater was created */,
  "repeater_type" TEXT /* Type of repeater (e.g., analog, digital) */,
  "repeater_model" TEXT /* Model of the repeater */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repeater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repeater_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repeaters_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repeaters_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repeaters_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repeaters_pr_st_id FOREIGN KEY ("pr_st_id") REFERENCES pr_st ("pr_st_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the area */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of area (e.g., city, county, region) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pr_st" (
  "pr_st_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province or state */,
  "pr_st_name" TEXT /* Name of the province or state */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the province or state is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pr_st_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "repeater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repeater involved in the activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., maintenance, update) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_repeater_id FOREIGN KEY ("repeater_id") REFERENCES repeaters ("repeater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "repeater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repeater involved in the activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., call, test) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_repeater_id FOREIGN KEY ("repeater_id") REFERENCES repeaters ("repeater_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repeater_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "repeater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repeater */,
  "tx_power" REAL /* Transmit power of the repeater */,
  "rx_sensitivity" REAL /* Receive sensitivity of the repeater */,
  "noise_floor" REAL /* Noise floor of the repeater */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repeater_performance_repeater_id FOREIGN KEY ("repeater_id") REFERENCES repeaters ("repeater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repeater_configuration" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration entry */,
  "repeater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repeater */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration (e.g., frequency, antenna) */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the configuration update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repeater_configuration_repeater_id FOREIGN KEY ("repeater_id") REFERENCES repeaters ("repeater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repeater_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "repeater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repeater */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repeater_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repeater_comments_repeater_id FOREIGN KEY ("repeater_id") REFERENCES repeaters ("repeater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
